Python: Learn Python by taking online courses from Coursera, Udemy, or freeCodeCamp. Focus on algorithms, data structures, and libraries like NumPy and Pandas.
JavaScript: Master JavaScript fundamentals, ES6+ features, and asynchronous programming. Build projects to practice DOM manipulation and event handling.
Java: Study Java OOP concepts, Collections Framework, and Spring Boot. Complete coding challenges on LeetCode and HackerRank to strengthen skills.
React: Build practical React applications. Learn state management with Redux, routing with React Router, and hooks for functional components.
Docker: Learn containerization with Docker. Practice creating Dockerfiles, managing images, and working with Docker Compose for multi-container applications.
AWS: Explore AWS services through free tier. Focus on EC2, S3, RDS, and Lambda. Get AWS certified to validate your knowledge.
Git: Master Git version control. Practice branching, merging, and collaborative workflows. Use GitHub for personal projects.
REST API: Design RESTful APIs following best practices. Learn about HTTP methods, status codes, and API documentation with Swagger/OpenAPI.
SQL: Strengthen SQL skills by writing complex queries, understanding indexes, and optimizing performance. Practice with sample databases.
Data Analysis: Use tools like Python (Pandas, Matplotlib) or R for data analysis. Work on real datasets from Kaggle to build a portfolio.
Machine Learning: Study ML fundamentals, supervised/unsupervised learning, and model evaluation. Use scikit-learn and TensorFlow for hands-on practice.
Statistics: Review probability, hypothesis testing, regression, and ANOVA. Use Python or R to apply statistical concepts to real data.
Communication: Practice technical writing, presentation skills, and documentation. Write blog posts about your learnings and projects.
Problem Solving: Solve coding challenges on LeetCode, HackerRank, or CodeSignal. Focus on different algorithm paradigms daily.
Team Work: Contribute to open-source projects. Collaborate on GitHub, participate in code reviews, and practice working in team environments.
Angular: Learn Angular framework concepts like services, dependency injection, and reactive forms. Build component-based applications.
Vue.js: Master Vue.js fundamentals, component lifecycle, and state management with Vuex. Create interactive web applications.
Node.js: Learn asynchronous programming, event loops, and npm ecosystem. Build backend servers and APIs with Express or Fastify.
MongoDB: Understand NoSQL database concepts. Learn CRUD operations, indexing, and aggregation pipelines in MongoDB.
Kubernetes: Study container orchestration with Kubernetes. Learn pods, services, deployments, and practice with Minikube or Docker Desktop.
Testing: Learn unit testing, integration testing, and test-driven development. Use Jest, Pytest, or JUnit depending on your tech stack.
